allow: PowerShell($env:Path = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "User"\) + ";" + [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "Machine"\); Get-Command hermes -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue 2>&1; if \(-not \(Get-Command hermes -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\)\) { Write-Output "hermes NOT found in fresh PATH" })
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Users\\Yvette\\AppData\\Local\\hermes\\hermes-agent\\venv\\Scripts;" + $env:Path; hermes --help 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Users\\Yvette\\AppData\\Local\\hermes\\hermes-agent\\venv\\Scripts;" + $env:Path; python -c "from prompt_toolkit.output.win32 import Win32Output; o = Win32Output\($null\); print\('Win32Output OK, buffer info:', o.get_win32_screen_buffer_info\(\)\)" 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Users\\Yvette\\AppData\\Local\\hermes\\hermes-agent\\venv\\Scripts;" + $env:Path; hermes -z "你好，请说hello world" 2>&1)
PowerShell($env:Path = "C:\\Users\\Yvette\\AppData\\Local\\hermes\\hermes-agent\\venv\\Scripts;" + $env:Path; hermes -z "你好，说hello" 2>&1)

PowerShell(Get-PSDrive C | Select-Object @{N='Used\(GB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,1\)}}, @{N='Free\(GB\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,1\)}}, @{N='Total\(GB\)';E={[math]::Round\(\($_.Used+$_.Free\)/1GB,1\)}})

PowerShell($disk = Get-CimInstance Win32_LogicalDisk -Filter "DeviceID='C:'"; Write-Output "C盘: 总$\([math]::Round\($disk.Size/1GB,1\)\)GB / 已用$\([math]::Round\(\($disk.Size-$disk.FreeSpace\)/1GB,1\)\)GB / 剩余$\([math]::Round\($disk.FreeSpace/1GB,1\)\)GB")

PowerShell(@\("$env:TEMP", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Temp", "C:\\Windows\\Temp", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\Windows\\INetCache", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\Windows\\Explorer"\) | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { $size = \(Get-ChildItem -Path $_ -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum; Write-Output "$_ : $\([math]::Round\($size/1MB,1\)\) MB" } })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path C:\\Users\\Yvette -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $size = \(Get-ChildItem -Path $_.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{ Name=$_.Name; SizeGB=[math]::Round\($size/1GB,2\) } } | Sort-Object SizeGB -Descending | Select-Object -First 15)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path C:\\ -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -notin @\('Windows','Program Files','Program Files \(x86\)','ProgramData'\) } | ForEach-Object { $size = \(Get-ChildItem -Path $_.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{ Name=$_.Name; SizeGB=[math]::Round\($size/1GB,2\) } } | Sort-Object SizeGB -Descending)

PowerShell($big = @\("$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads", "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop", "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents", "C:\\Program Files", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)"\); $results = foreach \($d in $big\) { if \(Test-Path $d\) { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $d -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{Path=$d; SizeGB=[math]::Round\($size/1GB,2\)} } }; $results | Sort-Object SizeGB -Descending)
PowerShell(\(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1GB)
PowerShell(\(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1GB)

PowerShell(\(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files" -Directory | ForEach-Object { $s = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; "$\([math]::Round\($s/1GB,1\)\) GB`t$\($_.Name\)" } | Sort-Object -Descending | Select-Object -First 10\))
PowerShell(\(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1GB)
PowerShell(\(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Windows" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1GB)
PowerShell(dir C:\\hiberfil.sys,C:\\pagefile.sys,C:\\swapfile.sys -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{N='GB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1GB,2\)}})

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads" -Directory | ForEach-Object { $s = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$_.Name; GB=[math]::Round\($s/1GB,2\)} } | Sort-Object GB -Descending)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Documents" -Directory | ForEach-Object { $s = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{Name=$_.Name; GB=[math]::Round\($s/1GB,2\)} } | Sort-Object GB -Descending)
PowerShell(cmd /c "dir C:\\pagefile.sys /s 2>&1")
PowerShell(cmd /c "dir C:\\hiberfil.sys /s 2>&1")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\Downloads" -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 | ForEach-Object { "{0:N2} GB  {1}" -f \($_.Length/1GB\), $_.Name })

PowerShell($path = "C:\\Users\\Yvette\\AppData\\Local\\NVIDIA"; if \(Test-Path $path\) { $sizeBefore = \(Get-ChildItem $path -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1GB; Get-ChildItem $path -Directory | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-ChildItem $path -File | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; $sizeAfter = \(Get-ChildItem $path -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1GB; Write-Output "NVIDIA: 删除前 $\([math]::Round\($sizeBefore,2\)\)GB, 剩余 $\([math]::Round\($sizeAfter,2\)\)GB" } else { Write-Output "NVIDIA path not found" })

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\Users\\Yvette\\AppData\\Roaming\\kingsoft", "C:\\Users\\Yvette\\AppData\\Local\\Kingsoft"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { $s = \(Get-ChildItem $p -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1GB; Get-ChildItem $p -Directory | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-ChildItem $p -File | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Output "WPS: $p 删除 $\([math]::Round\($s,2\)\)GB" } })

PowerShell($path = "C:\\Users\\Yvette\\.cache\\codex-runtimes"; if \(Test-Path $path\) { $s = \(Get-ChildItem $path -Recurse -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum / 1GB; Remove-Item $path -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Codex: 删除 $\([math]::Round\($s,2\)\)GB" } else { Write-Output "Codex path not found" })
